title: No Creative In Survival
description:
NoCreativeInSurvival
Prevents players from switching to Creative mode while in Survival. Automatically forces Survival mode with a warning message.
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/JecueFjAWKM" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

**Prevents players from switching to Creative mode while in Survival. Automatically forces Survival mode with a warning message.**

### Full translation support.
With the No Creative In Survival language pack, including Ukrainian, Russian, Spanish, and more in the future.

[Click here to go to the page.](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/no-creative-in-survival-(language-pack))
